title: Mackay, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mackay, Queensland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mackay is a city in Queensland with a population of 86,002. Queensland’s sugar capital with beautiful beaches, the Eungella National Park, and a thriving mining industry.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
